title: Tie vote
doc_html:
Rule 10.6.  Tie vote

Except as provided in Rule 9.12, if the vote on any question results in a tie, the motion shall fail to pass.

Mason's Manual:  Sec. 513(1)

HR 3, 1973; HR 45, 1998, eff. May 20, 1998.
doc_text:
Rule 10.6.  Tie vote
Except as provided in Rule 9.12, if the vote on any question results in a tie, the motion shall fail to pass.
Mason's Manual:  Sec. 513(1)
HR 3, 1973; HR 45, 1998, eff. May 20, 1998.
